{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sage of the Hungry Deep
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of the Hungry Deep]] tracks a rogue black [[dragon]] to the [[Everwood continent]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
